name: HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_VL
query: SELECT HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGE_ID TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGE_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.TM_ATRB_FLD_CONTEXT_ID TM_ATRB_FLD_CONTEXT_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.TM_ATRB_FLD_ID TM_ATRB_FLD_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.NAME NAME, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_TL.DISPLAY_NAME DISPLAY_NAME, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_TL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.USER_DATA_SOURCE_USAGE_ID USER_DATA_SOURCE_USAGE_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.ADMIN_DATA_SOURCE_USAGE_ID ADMIN_DATA_SOURCE_USAGE_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.SGUID, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.TM_ATRB_FLD_CODE, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.CXT_CODE FROM HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B, HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_TL WHERE HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_B.TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGE_ID = HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_TL.TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGE_ID AND HWM_TM_ATRB_FLD_USAGES_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
